headline: Man's 'Quick Grocery Run' Takes 3 Hours Because He Had To Research Every Purchase On His Phone
summary: He now knows the entire supply chain of the organic avocados. He still doesn't know what's for dinner.
fullBody: Jake Researcher entered the grocery store for milk. He emerged 3 hours later with a binder full of notes. 'I needed to compare grass-fed vs grain-fed,' Jake explained. 'And also the sustainability practices of the yogurt company.' He forgot the milk. His family ate cereal with water. Jake is now 'meal prepping' — which means 'researching recipes he'll never make.'
